prompt: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_workspace_repo, clean up the workspace layout for a release prep. Move markdown notes from notes/drafts, notes/raw, reports, and tmp into docs while preserving file contents; move logs and json artifacts from artifacts/tmp and misc into artifacts/logs; create/update docs/workspace_manifest.json listing moved_documents, moved_logs, and moved_json_artifacts as file names, plus total_artifacts. Keep edits limited to file moves/creation and leave source code untouched. Run tests, then summarize exactly what you moved and any risk of data loss.

envelope.raw_input: In the repo rooted at live_appv2_workspace_repo, clean up the workspace layout for a release prep. Move markdown notes from notes/drafts, notes/raw, reports, and tmp into docs while preserving file contents; move logs and json artifacts from artifacts/tmp and misc into artifacts/logs; create/update docs/workspace_manifest.json listing moved_documents, moved_logs, and moved_json_artifacts as file names, plus total_artifacts. Keep edits limited to file moves/creation and leave source code untouched. Run tests, then summarize exactly what you moved and any risk of data loss.
envelope.normalized_input: Reorganize non-source workspace files in live_appv2_workspace_repo by moving specified notes, logs, and JSON artifacts into target docs/artifacts locations, update docs/workspace_manifest.json with moved file-name lists and total count, keep changes limited to moves/creation, run tests, and report moved items plus any data-loss risk.
envelope.user_goal: Prepare the repository workspace for release by consolidating notes/logs/artifacts, recording moved files in a manifest, validating with tests, and receiving an exact move summary with data-loss risk notes.
risks: accidental overwrite or collision during moves
data loss from incorrect move scope or path resolution
misclassification of files as markdown/log/json artifacts
incomplete manifest entries or incorrect total_artifacts count
test failures unrelated to file moves causing completion ambiguity
context_needed: Exact repository-relative locations for reports, tmp, and misc (currently ambiguous).
Whether docs and artifacts/logs already exist or must be created.
Definition of which files in source folders qualify as logs and JSON artifacts when mixed content exists.
Canonical test command(s) to run in this repository.
Conflict policy if destination already contains files with same names.
constraints: Keep edits limited to file moves/creation.
Populate docs/workspace_manifest.json with moved_documents, moved_logs, moved_json_artifacts, and total_artifacts.
Summarize exactly what was moved and any risk of data loss after running tests.
ambiguity: Whether reports, tmp, and misc are top-level directories or relative to other paths.
Whether 'json artifacts' means all .json files in specified sources or only a subset.
Expected behavior for duplicate filenames across multiple source directories.

phase_plan.objective: Reorganize non-source repository files into target docs/artifacts locations, create or update docs/workspace_manifest.json with required moved-file lists and totals, validate via tests, and deliver an exact move and data-loss-risk summary.
phase_plan.strategy: First inspect repository layout and current files to resolve path and classification ambiguities, then define deterministic move and collision-handling rules, perform only scoped file moves/manifest creation-update without touching source code, verify results with manifest/count checks plus test execution evidence, and conclude with a precise report of moved items and residual risk.

phases.goal: Establish repository root scope, enumerate relevant source/destination paths, and collect pre-mutation file inventory evidence.
instructions: Resolve repository root from runtime_repo_scope_input and treat it as the only writable workspace.
Inspect existence/type of notes/drafts, notes/raw, reports, tmp, artifacts/tmp, misc, docs, artifacts/logs, and docs/workspace_manifest.json.
Enumerate candidate files from specified source locations with path, extension, and size where available.
Record missing, mixed, or ambiguous path states explicitly for downstream analysis.
acceptance_checks: All required literal paths are observed with existence and kind statuses.
Candidate file list includes all discoverable files under declared source paths.
No filesystem mutations are performed in DISCOVER.

phases.goal: Resolve path ambiguities, define deterministic classification rules, and set safe collision policy before planning moves.
instructions: Use discovery evidence to resolve whether reports, tmp, and misc are top-level or nested; document assumptions/blockers if unresolved.
Define deterministic rules for document, log, and json_artifact classification grounded in extensions and path context.
Define duplicate filename collision policy for destination conflicts without inventing unverified outcomes.
Produce explicit resolved source path sets for documents and logs_json categories.
acceptance_checks: Classification rules explicitly cover markdown, log, and json artifact assignment.
Resolved source paths are concrete and bounded by discovered repository structure.
Collision policy is explicit and safe.

phases.goal: Create a complete, constrained reorganization plan and manifest mapping before any mutation.
instructions: Translate analysis decisions into planned directory creations and planned moves with category labels.
Map planned moves to manifest lists: moved_documents, moved_logs, moved_json_artifacts.
Ensure destination paths are limited to docs and artifacts/logs and manifest target is docs/workspace_manifest.json.
Do not execute mutations; output only planned actions.
acceptance_checks: Every planned move has source_path, destination_path, and category.
Manifest mapping keys match required keys for move lists.
Plan avoids source code paths and non-scoped destinations.

phases.goal: Execute scoped file moves/creations and create or update docs/workspace_manifest.json according to the approved plan.
instructions: Create required destination directories if missing.
Execute planned moves while preserving file content, recording preservation checks when available.
Create or update docs/workspace_manifest.json using required keys and computed totals.
Record any skipped/failed actions with reasons; do not modify source code files.

metadata.rationale: Use advisory mode due runtime-discovered path ambiguity; enforce scope via destination and manifest constraints.

acceptance_checks: Executed moves correspond to designed planned moves or documented safe skips/failures.
Manifest record contains required keys and total_artifacts.
Mutations remain limited to move/create/update actions in scoped paths.

phases.goal: Verify filesystem outcomes, manifest correctness, source-code untouched status, and test execution evidence.
instructions: Check destination existence for moved files and validate that manifest lists match executed move results.
Verify manifest required keys are present and total_artifacts equals combined moved list lengths.
Verify source code untouched status using repository state evidence.
Attempt at least one canonical repository test command (auto-detected if necessary) and record runtime outcome.
acceptance_checks: Filesystem and manifest verification evidence is complete and internally consistent.
Test execution evidence includes attempted commands and explicit status.
Any blocked/not_found test status includes clear reason.

phases.goal: Produce exact user-facing move summary and data-loss risk assessment grounded only in recorded evidence.
instructions: Assemble moved_documents, moved_logs, moved_json_artifacts, and total_artifacts from mutation and manifest records.
Set test_outcome from verify_test_execution_evidence without extrapolation.
Provide residual ambiguities and data-loss risk assessment tied to verification results.
Do not claim unverified success states.
acceptance_checks: Final report lists exact moved filenames by required categories.
total_artifacts is consistent with manifest and verification evidence.
Risk assessment and test outcome are evidence-grounded.

global_invariants: Restrict changes to file moves/creation and docs/workspace_manifest.json creation/update only.
Manifest must include exactly moved_documents, moved_logs, moved_json_artifacts, and total_artifacts keys (additional keys not required).
Do not claim repository state changes, manifest validity, or test success without runtime evidence.
Preserve exact user literals for paths and JSON key names throughout planning and reporting.
success_criteria: All markdown notes moved from resolved locations of notes/drafts, notes/raw, reports, and tmp into docs with contents preserved and recorded.
All logs and JSON artifacts moved from resolved locations of artifacts/tmp and misc into artifacts/logs according to explicit classification rules.
docs/workspace_manifest.json exists and contains moved_documents, moved_logs, moved_json_artifacts as file-name lists and total_artifacts equal to combined list lengths.
Verification evidence confirms destination files exist, manifest entries match executed moves, and source code files were not modified.
At least one canonical test command is attempted and test outcome is reported with runtime evidence (or explicit blocked/not_found reason).
Final report provides exact moved file-name lists and a clear data-loss risk summary grounded in verification results.

artifact_contracts.description: Runtime-provided repository scope and root identifier for all file operations.
Runtime-provided literal paths, manifest target, required JSON keys, and hard constraints that must be preserved.
Observed repository file inventory and existence state for all relevant source and destination paths before any mutation.
Deterministic decisions for ambiguous path resolution, file-type classification rules, and collision policy used for safe moves.
Planned move/create actions and manifest population mapping prior to mutation.
Ledger of executed file moves and directory/file creations performed during mutation.
Final manifest content written to docs/workspace_manifest.json after mutation.
Post-mutation verification evidence that moved files exist at destinations, manifest matches actual moves, and counts are correct.
Evidence of test command selection/execution and outcome after reorganization.
User-facing exact summary of moved items and explicit data-loss risk assessment grounded in verification evidence.

result.summary: Cannot complete DISCOVER phase: tool budget exhausted, missing required discover_workspace_inventory artifact.

read manifest file content for existence and data
